title: saxifraga nervosa subsp. exarata
intro: Saxifraga nervosa subsp. exarata is a subspecies of the Saxifraga nervosa plant, commonly known as 'nervous saxifrage' or 'tall saxifrage', which is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the saxifrage family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic and nervine effects, which are said to soothe and calm the nervous system. The health benefits of Saxifraga nervosa subsp. exarata include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including nervous disorders and insomnia.
